mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_step (task_id, step_no, step_type, status, input_summary, output_summary, latency_ms, model_name, llm_latency_ms, input_tokens, output_tokens, finish_reason, started_at, finished_at, updated_at, error_message) VALUES (CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid), #{stepNo}, #{stepType}, #{status}, #{inputSummary}, #{outputSummary}, #{latencyMs}, #{modelName}, #{llmLatencyMs}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{finishReason}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{errorMessage})
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, step_no, step_type, status, input_summary, output_summary, latency_ms, model_name, llm_latency_ms, input_tokens, output_tokens, finish_reason, started_at, finished_at, updated_at, error_message FROM agent_step WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.update:
UPDATE agent_step
status = #{status}, output_summary = #{outputSummary}, latency_ms = #{latencyMs}, model_name = #{modelName}, llm_latency_ms = #{llmLatencyMs}, input_tokens = #{inputTokens}, output_tokens = #{outputTokens}, finish_reason = #{finishReason}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, error_message = #{errorMessage},
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, step_no, step_type, status, input_summary, output_summary, latency_ms, model_name, llm_latency_ms, input_tokens, output_tokens, finish_reason, started_at, finished_at, updated_at, error_message FROM agent_step WHERE task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid) AND status = 'RUNNING'
